mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reaction (target_type, target_id, user_id, type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{userId}, #{type}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reaction WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id, u.login_id AS loginId, r.point, r.review_status, r.view_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reaction WHERE target_type = 'review' AND target_id = r.id AND type = 1) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reaction WHERE target_type = 'review' AND target_id = r.id AND type = -1) AS dislikeCount FROM reaction l JOIN review r ON l.target_id = r.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.target_type = 'review' AND l.type = 1 AND r.review_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY l.created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageable.pageSize} OFFSET #{pageable.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reaction l JOIN review r ON l.target_id = r.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.target_type = 'review' AND l.type = 1 AND r.review_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.category, p.location, p.view_count, p.post_status, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.login_id as loginId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reaction WHERE target_type = 'post' AND target_id = p.id AND type = 1) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reaction WHERE target_type = 'post' AND target_id = p.id AND type = -1) AS dislikeCount FROM reaction l JOIN post p ON l.target_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.target_type = 'post' AND l.type = 1 AND p.post_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY l.created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageable.pageSize} OFFSET #{pageable.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reaction l JOIN post p ON l.target_id = p.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.target_type = 'post' AND l.type = 1 AND p.post_status = 'ACTIVE'
